output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?universityLabel WHERE {
  ?university wdt:P154 ?mascot .
  ?mascot rdfs:label ?mascotLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?mascotLabel) , 'en') && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?mascotLabel)) , 'buckeye'))
  .
  ?university rdfs:label ?universityLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?universityLabel) , 'en') && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?universityLabel)) , 'ohio state university'))
  .
}
